content.text: The current cryptocurrency market shows a range of asset prices. Wrapped Bitcoin (WBTC) is trading at $80,488.74, while Wrapped Ethereum (WETH) is priced at $2,018.31. Solana (SOL) is valued at $126.42, and ai16z is at $0.1925.

categories.title: Bug Fixes for the-org Build and NEAR AI Image Generation

content.text: A fix has been implemented to resolve the missing moment rollup external issue in the-org build.

A bug fix has been applied to the NEAR AI image generation process. The update ensures that the image generation API invocation works correctly without falling back to OpenAI. The fix includes adding the missing NEAR AI branch in the `generateImage` function, using OpenAI-compatible APIs. Testing confirms that the issue has been resolved.

categories.title: Issues with pnpm Installation and Plugin Errors in ElizaOS

content.text: A user is experiencing issues with pnpm installation and build while working with ElizaOS. After switching from eliza-starter to the main Eliza repository, they encountered an error stating 'Failed to switch pnpm to v9.15.7' due to a missing or incorrect pnpm CLI path. Despite forcing pnpm to switch to the correct version, the issue persists during the build process, affecting multiple packages such as @elizaos/client-direct and @elizaos/core.

Another user is facing an error while processing tweets using the @elizaos-plugins/client-twitter plugin. Despite all plugins working correctly in previous launches, the issue arose after an update. The error log indicates a missing package '@elizaos-plugins/client-telegram' and various deprecation warnings. Additionally, there are warnings about invalid embedding inputs and message structures, which may be contributing to the failure in processing Twitter actions.
A fix was implemented to resolve a missing moment rollup external issue in the 'the-org' build.
Core types were added to enable the generation of 'index.d.ts' in the '/dist' directory, addressing missing type errors in imports.

A user reported being unable to get past 'pnpm install' and 'build' due to a missing 'pnpm CLI' error. Despite forcing 'pnpm' to switch to version 9.15.7, the issue persisted during the build process.

A tutorial on building a Social AI Agent in 15 minutes was found to be outdated. The embedded video and textual instructions no longer align with the current implementation. Additionally, inconsistencies in the documentation regarding Twitter as a client or plugin were noted.

A user encountered an 'Error processing tweet undefined' issue while using the '@elizaos-plugins/client-twitter' plugin. The error persisted despite ensuring the fork was up to date and checking various configurations.
A fix was introduced for NEAR AI image generation, ensuring the correct API invocation and preventing fallback to OpenAI. The update was tested successfully in a related PR.
A minor fix was made to the Telegram plugin by adding 'serviceType', enabling multi-platform support for Ruby.
Six contributors merged two pull requests, focusing on various improvements across the project.
